span.p: Section 157: Harbouring persons hired for an unlawful assembly (eff: 1872-01-01)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Harbours, receives or assembles any persons in any house or premises

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: That house or premises is in his occupation or charge, or under his control

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Knowing that such persons have been hired, engaged or employed, or are about ...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: With the intention of permitting or facilitating them to join or become membe...
